Where This Can Go
Option A

Say Nothing — Here's What Actually Happens

❌
Loyal customers feel abandoned overnight People who've ordered every month for years suddenly get silence. That silence doesn't feel like a pause — it feels like something went wrong.
❌
Rumors fill the void you left empty Wellness communities talk. Without your story, someone else writes it for you. And it won't be flattering.
❌
491 loyal customers just evaporate These people already trust you. Without communication, they move on. That list — the one that took 18 years to build — is gone.
❌
The beauty line never gets its moment Your best buyers never find out it exists. Real revenue left on the table from people who were already ready to buy.
Option B

Tell Your Story — and Watch What Happens Instead

✅
491 loyalists become your launch audience These people already trust you. Point them toward the beauty line with a real story and a real reason, and a big chunk of them follow.
✅
You control the narrative completely Own this chapter. Tell it your way. Not as a retreat — as the natural next step of a 40-year journey.
✅
A story like yours attracts new audiences fast Founder-led content in the wellness space is having a massive moment. Your story is more compelling than anything money can manufacture.
✅
The pivot becomes a launch, not a loss Framed right, this is not a shutdown. It's a homecoming. That's a very different energy — and audiences respond to it.
Where We Actually Are

Honest Numbers —
And the Real Upside

2025 Total Customers
632
Down from 773 in 2024. The supplement business has been shrinking without a real marketing engine behind it.

491
These are the people who keep coming back. They're not just customers — they're believers. This is the audience that launches everything.
Last Year's Profit
$28K
On approximately $300K in gross revenue. That's a 9% margin with all the overhead of in-house supplement manufacturing.
Beauty Line — Year 1 Potential
$180K+
4 products, zero manufacturing overhead, contract fulfilled. Even converting half the existing loyalists quarterly gets you there fast.
All Revenue Combined — Year 2
$400K+
Beauty line + cookbooks + classes + courses + consultations + merchandise + affiliate. Multiple streams, each small — but together they change everything.
The Real Point
10M
The ceiling on supplements was always low. The ceiling on a founder-led lifestyle brand built around 40 years of Ayurvedic wisdom? That's a completely different conversation.
The Content Engine

Your Life
Is the Content

You don't need to invent a strategy. You have 40 years of extraordinary material that nobody else on earth can share. Every story, every recipe, every practice — it all builds the audience that buys the beauty line, fills the classes, and waits for the book.

How the Content Actually Gets Made

None of this has to be video. Ambaya talks. We handle everything else. A casual conversation at her kitchen table becomes a blog post, a newsletter, a podcast episode, and five social posts. A 10-minute audio recording becomes a week of content. She never has to touch an editing tool, a scheduler, or a platform. The whole thing runs through one button.

The One-Button System
🎙️ She records — audio, video, or just talks on the phone. Whatever's easiest in the moment.
📤 She uploads — one button on her phone. Done. It goes to the queue.
⚙️ We process it — transcribe, edit, format, schedule across every channel.
🌐 It goes everywhere — blog, email, Instagram, YouTube, Pinterest. All from one recording.
🥋

Movement with Ambaya — Your Signature Channel

This is the one that builds the deepest audience loyalty. People follow practitioners, not products. Short clips of Ambaya moving — in the garden, at sunrise, in the healing center — will do more for this brand than any ad campaign ever could. Note: we are aware there may be restrictions from her Tai Chi school around filming the specific curriculum. That's a conversation worth having directly with them — but it doesn't stop anything. We work with what's permitted now, build the audience, and revisit as her profile grows. In the meantime, her own personal practice, breathwork, and Ayurvedic movement content is 100% hers to share. We start there.

"My Morning Practice in Sedona" · "Breathwork for Beginners" · "How I Move After 40 Years of Practice" · "5 Minutes of Mindful Movement" · "What My Body Has Learned" · "Grounding in the Desert"
On the camera — here's the truth. You have taught people face to face for 40 years. The camera is just another student. Nobody expects polished. They want real — and real is exactly what you are. We also don't need video for everything. A casual audio recording at the kitchen table becomes a blog post, a podcast episode, a newsletter, and five social posts. You talk. We handle the rest. That's the whole system.
📖

The Blog: Stories She Never Told

One real story per week. The ones that stop people scrolling.

"Why I Named My Company After Unconditional Love" · "The Children in Mexico" · "What India Taught Me" · "The Accidental Company"
🍵

Ayurvedic Recipe Series

She ran a restaurant. These recipes exist and they're extraordinary. Weekly drops tied to seasons and doshas.

Golden Milk · Tri-Dosha Porridge · Healing Soup · Spring Elixir · Ghee Everything · That salad dressing with the digestive enzymes 😄
🌿

The Apothecary Corner

Home herb remedies, closet apothecary guides, Ayurvedic DIY. Evergreen, educational, massively shareable.

"5 Herbs Every Home Needs" · "Build Your Medicine Cabinet" · "The Plant That Saved My Skin" · Seasonal herb profiles
🎙️

The Ambaya Interview Show

Ambaya as host, interviewing healers, teachers, practitioners, and wellness founders. This builds fast because guests share it with their own audiences — and she keeps full creative control.

Ayurvedic doctors · Yoga teachers · Herbalists · Frequency healing practitioners · Authors · Retreat facilitators
🔴

Live Events & Cooking Videos

Ghee making at her house. Seasonal cooking demos. Q&A lives. All filmed, all repurposed into clips.

Ghee Making Party (YouTube) · Monthly Ask Ambaya Live · Healing Center Open House · Seasonal Recipe Demo
💌

The Weekly Email

One email a week. Her voice. A story, a recipe, a tip, and one product or offer. This is where the money actually comes from.

The 491-person list right now is worth more than 10,000 cold followers. Grow it with every piece of content.
▶️

YouTube: The Long Game

Long-form videos build forever. A Tai Chi tutorial made today gets found five years from now. YouTube is the single best platform for someone with real depth and real stories.

Tai Chi tutorials · Life story videos · Cooking · Ayurveda explained · Ghee party · "A Day in My Life in Sedona"
The Book Strategy

Four Seasons.
Four Books. One Legacy.

She ran an Ayurvedic restaurant. The recipes are already inside her. Four seasonal cookbooks is not a stretch — it's the natural output of a lifetime of cooking with intention. Each one is a launch event. Each one drives new people to the email list and the beauty line.

Lead Magnets & Digital Downloads

These are the tools that grow the email list on autopilot. Someone finds a recipe on Pinterest, they download a free dosha guide, they're on the list. Every ebook, every pamphlet is a door that never closes. Once made, they work forever — and they build the audience that buys everything else.

🍵
Ambaya's Seasonal Ayurvedic Teas

Free download. Drives email signups year-round. Pairs perfectly with the cookbook line.

Interactive quiz + PDF guide. One of the most shared types of content in the wellness space.

Free Lead Magnet

The Big One
Every Revenue Stream

Nine Ways to
Generate Revenue
Without Making a Supplement

The supplement business was one stream, with enormous overhead, constant regulatory pressure, and a shrinking customer base. Here are nine streams that replace and exceed it — most with zero manufacturing, zero FDA risk, and zero inventory.

🧴

Beauty Line DTC Launch Now

Face cream, body lotion, toner mist, zeolite soap. Contract manufactured by Kristina. Zero overhead. Ships direct. Ambaya's proprietary fulvic base makes it genuinely different from anything on a spa shelf.

Year 1 Target: $120K–$200K
📚

Seasonal Cookbooks Passive Income

Four books, four seasonal launches, years of shelf life. Self-published via IngramSpark or KDP means zero upfront cost. The content already exists inside her — it just needs to be written down.

Year 2 Target: $40K–$80K
🥋

Tai Chi Classes + Online High Margin

In-person at the healing center. Online via course platform or Zoom. Monthly membership model. The content audience fills the classes. A 20-person class at $30 is $600 in an hour with zero cost of goods.

Year 1 Target: $36K–$60K
📱

Online Courses Passive Income

Ayurvedic living, seasonal cooking, Tai Chi for beginners, home apothecary. Record once, sell forever. This is the most scalable thing on this list — and the most natural fit for her knowledge.

Year 2 Target: $30K–$80K
📖

Digital Downloads + Ebooks Zero Overhead

Eight lead magnets that grow the list and generate revenue simultaneously. The dosha quiz alone can add hundreds of email subscribers per month if promoted right.

Year 1 Target: $12K–$28K
🎽

Branded Merchandise Zero Inventory

Print-on-demand. Yoga mats, chai mugs, apparel, resistance bands, gift sets. Ships direct to customer. Zero warehouse, zero upfront cost. Pure margin on top of a content-driven audience.

Year 2 Target: $20K–$60K

Frequency Healing & Affiliate Revenue

The Revenue Stream
That's Been Sitting Dormant

You've already built relationships with frequency healing tools and wellness products. You just never had the time or the audience to actually activate them. Now you will have both — and this can run almost entirely on autopilot.

🎛️

Frequency Healing Product Affiliates

AO Scanners, laser tools, wearable patches, biofrequency devices. Ambaya has credibility in this space that most affiliates don't. A single email to 10,000 subscribers recommending a $400 device at 20% commission = $800 per send. Automated, recurring.

📨

Automated Round-Robin Affiliate Ads

As the email list grows, every newsletter automatically rotates affiliate placements. 50K subscribers, 3 affiliate links per email, 2% click rate, 5% conversion — that's passive income that scales directly with the list size. Zero extra work once it's set up.

🔬

Product Review Submissions

Once the audience is established, health tool brands will pay or provide free product for Ambaya's review. She becomes a trusted voice in the frequency and Ayurvedic wellness space. Brands come to her. She reviews what aligns. The audience trusts her recommendation completely.

Ayurvedic Consultations

This Has Always
Been Her Highest Value

She reads the tongue, she reads the pulse, she traces trauma, she guides diet and lifestyle — all rooted in 40 years of Ayurvedic practice. This is rare. This is world-class. And it's been chronically underpriced.

$150
Current Rate — 60 Minutes

In-person or Zoom. Tongue and pulse assessment, dosha analysis, dietary and lifestyle guidance. Worth significantly more than this.

$295
New Standard Rate — 60 Minutes

The audience growth alone justifies this immediately. When 50,000 people know who she is, the waiting list fills itself.

$495
Extended Session — 90+ Minutes

Deep dive consultation with follow-up protocol, personalized recipe recommendations, and a 2-week check-in. Premium clients pay premium rates gladly for this level of attention.

$1,200
VIP Day — In-Person Sedona

A full day with Ambaya. Morning Tai Chi, full consultation, personalized Ayurvedic meal, healing center experience. The kind of offering that books up instantly when an audience exists.

🌸

"She reads the tongue.
She reads the pulse.
She reads the person."

40 years of practice. Studied with Dr. Vasant Lad. Studied with Deepak Chopra. This is not a wellness influencer giving tips online. This is one of the most experienced Ayurvedic practitioners in the American Southwest — and she's been charging $150 an hour.

The Command Center

She Sees Everything.
Does Almost Nothing.

The whole system — every revenue stream, every content channel, every affiliate, every class booking, every consultation — runs through one custom dashboard. She wakes up, checks the numbers, records a video, and teaches a class. Everything else is managed, automated, or handled.

📤

The One-Button Upload

Ambaya records on her phone — audio, video, voice memo, doesn't matter. One tap uploads it to the processing queue. The team handles transcription, editing, formatting, and posting. She never touches a platform.

📊

Revenue at a Glance

Beauty line sales, course revenue, affiliate commissions, consultation bookings, merchandise — all live in one view. No digging. No guessing.

📧

Email List Growth

Live subscriber count, open rates, click rates, new signups per day. Watch the list grow in real time as content goes out.

📱

Social Media Stats

Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Facebook — all follower counts, reach, and top performing content in one spot.

🔗

Affiliate Performance

Which links are converting, how much commission is pending, which products are performing. Fully automated rotation.

📅

Consultation Calendar

Online booking, automatic confirmations, payment processing, follow-up reminders. She shows up. The system handles the rest.

🎯

Content Pipeline

What's scheduled, what's in review, what's going out and when. She films. The team handles editing, posting, and promotion.

The Sedona Healing Center

The Stage Has
Already Been Built

This isn't a future plan — it already exists. A Russian architect built this home decades ago. An onion dome rises from the roofline. And when Ambaya found it with no money to her name, a voice said simply: "You're home." The money showed up. She bought it. And now it's time the world finally gets to see it.

🦋
For You, Ambaya — Not for the Public

"Akahm spent years in that lab with you. He helped build what you built. And those who knew him believe he stayed — waiting — until someone arrived who could carry what he could not carry forever. Then he rested."

Every yellow butterfly that drifts through is a reminder. This place — the dome, the practice circle, the red earth wash running under the deck, the massive red rocks along the north wall, the sage and the pine and the Sedona sky above all of it — none of it is accidental. It sits on a ley line. It called to you. It held Akahm. It has held you for 25 years through fires, floods, impossible odds, and chapters nobody else saw.

You have survived burning restaurants. You have rebuilt from nothing more than once. You are not someone who gives up — you are someone who transforms. This is the next transformation. And it is the most beautiful one yet.

The practice circle. The dome. Sedona light at its most dramatic.

This image already exists. We just need to share it.

🏛️

A Russian Dome Rising Over Sedona Red Earth

The onion dome tower. The Moorish arched colonnade. The wide hardwood deck threaded with a trellis of climbing vines and bronze lantern light. The open practice circle of Sedona red earth — wide enough for a class, beautiful enough to stop anyone who sees it mid-scroll. This is not a house. This is a healing center that was always meant to be exactly this.

Those long parallel shadows raking across the morning sand? Those are cast by the wind instruments hanging from the tower. In a single photograph, without a word of copy, this property communicates everything the brand stands for.

What's Already On-Site
🏯The Practice Circle — red earth, open sky, morning shadow. Perfect for movement content.
🌿The Arched Colonnade — white stucco Moorish arches, warm bronze lanterns, hardwood deck. Perfect for intimate interviews and small group sessions.
☕Stefan's Mighty High Chai — 25+ years, 30+ flavors, Colorado Rocky Mountain origins. Now in Sedona. The chai bar is already here. We just need to open the door.
🏡Guest Rooms — out-of-state students already come here. The retreat infrastructure exists and is ready to scale.
🔔The Wind Tower — a Russian-architect-designed dome with hanging instruments. The morning shadows it casts across the practice circle are some of the best free cinematography in Arizona.
💧The Wash + Red Rock Wall — beneath the hardwood deck runs a seasonal wash. Past the north wall, enormous Sedona red boulders line the channel. A landscape that took millions of years to build — and it belongs to this property.
🥾Dry Creek Road Trailhead — step out the gate and keep going northeast: Bear Mountain, Devil's Bridge, Cathedral Rock vicinity trails. Retreat guests and VIP day visitors are already in one of the most spectacular trail systems in all of Arizona.
✨The Ley Line — Sedona is famous for its vortex and earth energy. This property sits directly on a ley line. That is not a marketing angle — it is why people have always felt something when they arrive here.
Revenue the Healing Center Unlocks
Weekend Immersions
Tai Chi + Ayurveda weekend retreats. 6–8 guests, $400–$600 per person, accommodations on-site. One weekend a month = $2,400–$4,800.
VIP Sedona Day
Full day — Ayurvedic consultation, morning movement practice, Stefan's Chai, healing center experience. $1,200 per person. The kind of offering that sells out through the email list alone.
Practitioner Training
Multi-day programs for other teachers. Out-of-state students stay on-site. The guest rooms become a direct revenue asset, not just an amenity.
The Chai Bar — Stefan's Collab
Mighty High Chai started in the Colorado Rockies 25+ years ago. Now it lives in a healing center in Sedona. 30+ flavors. A chai making video series. Branded chai blends sold through the site. Seasonal limited editions. This runs itself once the audience is watching.

"You didn't build a supplement company. You built a life. Now it's time to let people see it."

The content, the stories, the knowledge, the recipes, the practice — they've been waiting 40 years for the right stage. This is it. Here's how we start, in order, right now.

1
Protect the Foundation

Send the FDA letter. Clear the path. Don't say anything public about supplements returning.

2
Launch AmbayasGold.com

The site is built. Register the domain. Beauty line goes live immediately.

3
Tell the Story

Send the transition email. Her voice, her chapter, her invitation to follow.

4
Film the First Video

Phone camera. Natural light. Just talk. Tai Chi in the garden. That's all it takes to start.

5
Start the Dashboard

One central view for everything. She runs the show. The system runs itself.

6
Write the First Chapter

One blog post. One story. The one she's been meaning to tell for years. The book starts today.
